moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Weekend
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships, running from June 29 to July 12, are heading into their thrilling final weekend, with the Gentlemen's and Ladies' Singles Finals scheduled for July 11-12.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: Who's making history on the grass? Wimbledon's final weekend is almost here, get ready for some epic tennis! #Wimbledon

angles.name: Weekend Plans
angles.copy: Strawberries & cream at the ready? The biggest matches at Wimbledon are just days away. Who are you rooting for in the finals?

moments.title: F1 British Grand Prix
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 Pirelli British Grand Prix is taking place this weekend at Silverstone, with the main race scheduled for Sunday, July 5th.

angles.name: Race Day Excitement
angles.copy: Engines revving! The British Grand Prix is ON this weekend at Silverstone. Who's taking the chequered flag on Sunday?

angles.name: Local Buzz
angles.copy: The roar of F1 is filling the air at Silverstone! It's Grand Prix weekend, and the UK is ready for some high-speed drama.

moments.title: Latest UK Singles Chart
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart was updated yesterday, showcasing the biggest tracks and new entries dominating the airwaves this week.

angles.name: Chart Toppers
angles.copy: What's topping the Official UK Singles Chart this week? Tune in and find out which tracks are making waves!

angles.name: New Music Friday Recap
angles.copy: Did you catch yesterday's new UK Singles Chart? Any surprises, or did your favourite hold strong at the top?

moments.title: Happy 76th, Huey Lewis
moments.blurb: American singer Huey Lewis, known for his work with Huey Lewis and the News and hits like 'The Power of Love', turns 76 on July 5th.

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: Happy 76th Birthday to the legendary Huey Lewis! What's your go-to Huey Lewis and the News track?

angles.name: Power of Love
angles.copy: He's still got 'The Power of Love'! Sending birthday wishes to Huey Lewis, turning 76 tomorrow.

moments.title: 50 Cent Turns 51
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper, actor, and entrepreneur 50 Cent, born Curtis James Jackson III, celebrates his 51st birthday on July 6th.

angles.name: Hip Hop Legend
angles.copy: Go shorty, it's your birthday! Wishing a very Happy 51st Birthday to the one and only 50 Cent!

angles.name: In Da Club
angles.copy: From 'In Da Club' to TV screens, 50 Cent turns 51 on Monday. What's your favourite track from the rap mogul?

moments.title: Ringo Starr's 86th Birthday
moments.blurb: The legendary drummer for The Beatles, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday on July 7th.

angles.name: Beatles Icon
angles.copy: Peace and Love! The iconic Ringo Starr turns 86 on Tuesday. What's your favourite Beatles track featuring Ringo on vocals?

angles.name: Drumming Legend
angles.copy: Happy 86th Birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! A true legend behind the drum kit.

moments.title: Courtney Love Turns 62
moments.blurb: American singer, songwriter, and actress Courtney Love, best known as the frontwoman of the alternative rock band Hole, celebrates her 62nd birthday on July 9th.

angles.name: Grunge Queen
angles.copy: Happy 62nd Birthday to the unforgettable Courtney Love! What's your favourite Hole anthem?

angles.name: 90s Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating the fierce and fearless Courtney Love, turning 62 on Thursday. A true rock icon.

moments.title: Jack White Turns 51
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning musician, singer, and songwriter Jack White, known for The White Stripes, The Raconteurs, and his solo work, celebrates his 51st birthday on July 9th.

angles.name: Rock Innovator
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to the incredible Jack White! What's your favourite project from the rock maestro?

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: From The White Stripes to solo brilliance, Happy Birthday to Jack White, turning 51 on Thursday!

moments.title: Jessica Simpson Turns 46
moments.blurb: American singer, actress, and fashion designer Jessica Simpson, known for pop hits like 'I Wanna Love You Forever', celebrates her 46th birthday on July 10th.

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: Happy 46th Birthday to the multi-talented Jessica Simpson! What's your favourite track from her pop career?

angles.name: Throwback Pop
angles.copy: Remember 'I Wanna Love You Forever'? Wishing Jessica Simpson a very Happy 46th Birthday this Friday!

moments.title: Lil' Kim Turns 52
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper and icon Lil' Kim, known for her groundbreaking influence on hip-hop, celebrates her 52nd birthday on July 11th.

angles.name: Queen Bee
angles.copy: Happy 52nd Birthday to the legendary Queen Bee, Lil' Kim! What's your favourite track from the hip-hop icon?

angles.name: Hip Hop Royalty
angles.copy: From 'Lady Marmalade' to 'Hard Core', wishing Lil' Kim a very Happy 52nd Birthday this Saturday!

moments.title: Suzanne Vega Turns 67
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Suzanne Vega, known for her distinctive folk-inspired music and hits like 'Luka' and 'Tom's Diner', celebrates her 67th birthday on July 11th.

angles.name: Folk Icon
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to the incredible Suzanne Vega! Her timeless songs still resonate today. What's your favourite?

angles.name: Tom's Diner
angles.copy: Remember the iconic 'Tom's Diner'? Wishing a very Happy 67th Birthday to Suzanne Vega this Saturday!

moments.title: Harrison Ford's 84th Birthday
moments.blurb: Legendary American actor Harrison Ford, known for iconic roles as Han Solo and Indiana Jones, celebrates his 84th birthday on July 13th.

angles.name: Movie Legend
angles.copy: He's Han Solo, he's Indiana Jones! Happy 84th Birthday to the incomparable Harrison Ford this Monday!

angles.name: Iconic Roles
angles.copy: What's your favourite Harrison Ford movie? Celebrate his 84th birthday with us on July 13th!

moments.title: Summer Holidays Approaching
moments.blurb: Schools across the UK are preparing to break up for the long-awaited summer holidays towards the end of July, marking the start of peak holiday season.

angles.name: Holiday Countdown
angles.copy: The countdown is on! UK schools will soon be breaking up for the summer holidays. Where are you heading this year?

angles.name: Summer Plans
angles.copy: Nearly time for school's out for summer! What are your plans for the upcoming UK summer holidays?
